learn.title: Learn · How to use
learn.step1: Create a deck from any resource or note.
learn.step2: Study with spaced repetition to remember long-term.
learn.step3: Track your progress with the KPIs at the top.

agents.title: Agents · How to use
agents.step1: Create an agent and describe what it should do.
agents.step2: Give it access to your resources and skills.
agents.step3: Chat with it or trigger it from an automation.

automations.title: Automations · How to use
automations.step1: Pick a trigger: schedule, event or manual.
automations.step2: Choose the agent or action to run.
automations.step3: Check the Runs section to see results.

github.title: GitHub · How to use
github.step1: Connect a repository to sync issues and milestones.
github.step2: Track work on the Kanban and Gantt views.
github.step3: Changes sync back to GitHub automatically.

calendar.title: Calendar · How to use
calendar.step1: Connect a calendar or create events directly.
calendar.step2: Link events to projects and resources.
calendar.step3: Get reminders for what's coming up.

pipelines.title: Pipelines · How to use
pipelines.step1: Create a pipeline and add a stage for each step of your flow.
pipelines.step2: An agent is an AI with instructions that processes each card. Assign one to a stage, or use Many — and create a new agent right from the stage settings.
pipelines.step3: Drop cards in; agents run automatically or on demand, and you track activity and runs.
